originalTitle: Why the stock market’s red-hot momentum trade might be headed for a violent unwind this month
summary: Momentum trades tend to struggle in July — but this year may be particularly volatile, says one strategist. The rumblings have already started.
content: Momentum trades tend to struggle in July — but this year may be particularly volatile, says one strategist. The rumblings have already started.
chineseTitle: 为什么股市炙手可热的动量交易可能会在本月出现剧烈的平仓
chineseSummary: 一位策略师表示，7 月动能交易往往会陷入困境，但今年可能会特别不稳定。风声已经开始了。
chineseContent: 一位策略师表示，7 月动能交易往往会陷入困境，但今年可能会特别不稳定。风声已经开始了。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
